title: SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHERS - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF DOUGLAS COUNTY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vouchers to assist low-income households with rental costs. Once an eligible household is issued a voucher for rental assistance, the agency pays a portion of the household's rent directly to the landlords. Also issues both Family Choice Vouchers and HUD VASH Vouchers for veteran families. Additionally, fields general complaints about the Section 8 program. 1000 W Stanton Street Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Must meet income and asset guidelines Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm, Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 673-6548 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 673-6548 Administration (541) 673-6548 ext 113 Jamie Ambrosini [email protected] Toll-free (800) 398-0312 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. There is usually a 12-month waitlist for the program. FEES: Approximately 30%-40% of household adjusted gross income goes towards rent and utilities DOCUMENTS: Verification of Social Security numbers for all household members LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm, Friday 9am-noon Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers * Veterans Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING AUTHORITY OF DOUGLAS COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - LOW RENT PUBLIC HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTI-FAMILY AFFORDABLE HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF DOUGLAS COUNTY
